name: angular
description: Biome plugin for Angular — port of @angular-eslint rules

rules.name: prefer-standalone
rules.message: Angular components, directives, and pipes should declare standalone: true (Angular 17+).

rules.name: no-empty-lifecycle-method
rules.message: Angular lifecycle method is empty and can be removed.

rules.name: no-service-suffix
rules.message: Angular v20+: remove the 'Service' suffix. Use a descriptive name (Store, Api, Client, Facade…).

rules.name: no-directive-suffix
rules.message: Angular v20+: remove the 'Directive' suffix from class names. Name classes after what they represent.

rules.name: no-component-suffix
rules.message: Angular v20+: remove the 'Component' suffix from class names. Name classes after what they represent.

rules.name: component-selector
rules.message: Angular component selector must be kebab-case with the 'app-' prefix.

rules.name: no-input-rename
rules.message: Avoid renaming @Input() properties. Use the property name as the public API.

rules.name: no-output-rename
rules.message: Avoid renaming @Output() properties. Use the property name as the event name.

rules.name: no-output-on-prefix
rules.message: @Output() property names must not start with 'on' followed by an uppercase letter.

rules.name: pipe-prefix
rules.message: Pipe name must start with the configured prefix (default: 'app').

rules.name: sort-ngmodule-metadata-arrays
rules.message: NgModule metadata arrays (declarations, imports, exports, providers) must be sorted alphabetically.

rules.name: use-lifecycle-interface
rules.message: Classes with Angular lifecycle methods should implement the corresponding interface (e.g. OnInit, OnDestroy).

rules.name: use-pipe-transform-interface
rules.message: @Pipe classes must implement the PipeTransform interface.

rules.name: contextual-lifecycle
rules.message: Lifecycle hook used in the wrong context: view/content hooks are only available in @Component, not in @Directive, @Injectable, or @Pipe.

rules.name: prefer-signal-inputs
rules.message: Prefer the input() signal function over @Input() decorator (Angular 17.1+).

rules.name: prefer-output-function
rules.message: Prefer the output() function over @Output() + EventEmitter (Angular 17.3+).

rules.name: prefer-signal-queries
rules.message: Prefer signal-based query functions (viewChild, viewChildren, contentChild, contentChildren) over decorator-based queries (Angular 17.2+).

rules.name: prefer-model-signal
rules.message: Prefer model() over the @Input() + @Output() xyzChange two-way binding pattern (Angular 17.2+).

rules.name: prefer-host-property
rules.message: Prefer host: {} in @Component/@Directive over @HostBinding/@HostListener decorators.

rules.name: prefer-inject-function
rules.message: Prefer inject() over constructor-based dependency injection (Angular 14+).
